/home/fissure/miniconda3/envs/spatial-iteration-engine/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/fissure/miniconda3/envs/spatial-iteration-engine/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/fissure/miniconda3/envs/spatial-iteration-engine/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/fissure/miniconda3/envs/spatial-iteration-engine/lib -L/home/fissure/miniconda3/envs/spatial-iteration-engine/lib -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/perception_cpp.dir/link.d  -o perception_cpp.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/perception_cpp.dir/src/bridge/pybind_perception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/perception_cpp.dir/src/perception/face_landmarks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/perception_cpp.dir/src/perception/hand_landmarks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/perception_cpp.dir/src/perception/pose_landmarks.cpp.o
